chapter_title.en: Chapter on Growing Hair for Hajj and Umrah

text: 2521 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلْحِجَامَةِ وَ حَلْقِ اَلْقَفَا فِي أَشْهُرِ اَلْحَجِّ قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ وَ لاَ بَأْسَ بِالنُّورَةِ وَ اَلسِّوَاكِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2521 - It is narrated from Sama‘ah, who said:
I asked Imam (as) about cupping and shaving the nape during the months of Hajj.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it, nor in using Nuura (depilatory cream) or a toothstick (siwak)."
